title: Minecraftia Mono 16x Font
description: Monospace vanilla font edit intended for 1.8.9
body:
Monospace version of the Vanilla font.

Intended for use in programming for the most part, but also because at the time, no one had made a 1.8.9 monospace font.

**Note**: Some things may look odd (like ') because to make them monospaced, you can't do an easy solution.
	
_**Additionally,**_ ®, ≡, ⶩ, and ⶪ are special symbols that become programming language logos. (_C, JS, C++, Python_).

![test stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f4f3b347ebfc10f2e2a1805beee6b35b2815f4c.png)

Partially works for 1.21.11 (limited custom symbol support though)
